intended_use: RayStation is a software system for radiation therapy and medical oncology. Based on user input, RayStation proposes treatment plans. After a proposed treatment plan is reviewed and approved by author
intended_use_full: RayStation is a software system for radiation therapy and medical oncology. Based on user input, RayStation proposes treatment plans. After a proposed treatment plan is reviewed and approved by authorized intended users, RayStation may also be used to administer treatments.
target_condition: Patients prescribed external beam radiation therapy or medical oncology treatment
ground_truth: Published consensus data sets, measured doses from water tank and clinical measurements (plane-parallel chamber, EQUAL-ESTRO measurements), independent competing treatment planning systems, independent Monte Carlo software (BEAMnrc/egs++), and earlier versions of RayStation
other_metrics: Gamma pass rates (95% and 98% of computed depth dose values); dose calculation agreement within sub-percent level; less than 2% failure rate for gamma 2%/2mm criteria; SOBP distal fall-off accuracy for proton ocular treatments; segment MU agreement; field-in-field planning validation showing correct MU subdivision and segment preservation

recalls.reason: Potential for the invalidation for calculated radiation dose does not work as intended for certain Regions of Interest (ROIs). This issue occurs for some ROI(s) which have no contours and either have a material override defined, or are of type Bolus, Fixation, or Support. In these cases, adding geometry to the ROI, subsequently modifying geometry, or removing the material override does not invalidate dose as intended.
recalls.product_description:
Brand Name: RayStation
Product Name: RayStation/RayPlan
Model/Catalog Number: 13.0.0.1547, 13.1.0.144, 13.1.1.89
Software Version: RayStation 12A, RayStation 12A SP1, RayStation 12A SP2
Product Description: Radiation Therapy Treatment Planning System
Component: No

recalls.reason: Inconsistency in the use of Density uncertainty in the RayStation functions Robust optimization, Robust evaluation and Compute perturbed dose for proton and light ion treatment plans when a HU-to-mass density CT calibration curve used in RayStation version 4.5 to 2024B including some service packs.
recalls.product_description:
Brand Name: RayStation- Intended as a Radiation Therapy Treatment Planning System
Model/Catalog Number: 13.0.0.1547, 13.1.0.144, 13.1.1.89 and 14.0.0.3338
Software Version: RayStation 12A, 12A Service Pack 1 and 2 and 2023B

recalls.reason: A use error that has occurred with RayStation/RayPlan, where material override using Silicon, Si, was incorrectly selected for a silicone gel polymer implant.
recalls.product_description: RayStation Software Version Numbers version numbers 8B, 9A, 9B, 10A, 10B, 11A, 11B, 12A, 12B, 2023B, 2024A including some service packs.

recalls.reason: Potential for reported SSD to be too high.
recalls.product_description: RayStation 13.0.0.1547, 13.1.0.144 & 13.1.1.89.  Radiation Therapy Treatment Planning System.

recalls.reason: DICOM SOP Instance UID and Series Instance UID from RayGateway, i.e. the interface to Accuray's iDMS, are not guaranteed to be unique.
